title: Fluidic Tanks
description: Adds more fluidic fluid tanks to Minecraft! Supports Create, Mekanism, Aeronautics, Industrial Foregoing, Modern Industrialization, and any other mod you can think of!
body:
Adds more fluidic fluid tanks to Minecraft! Supports Create, Mekanism, Aeronautics, Industrial Foregoing, Modern Industrialization, and any other mod you can think of!

This mod is PERFECT for compact, small, high utilization factories. This will also help power your Aeronautics contraptions!

### **Fluidic Tank Tiers**

- Adds a fluid tank that can hold 8 buckets per block and can be morphed into any shape you can imagine! This can hold ANY modded fluid.

- Regular - 8 buckets

- Copper - 16 buckets

- Iron - 32 buckets

- Gold - 64 buckets

- Emerald - 128 buckets

- Diamond - 256 buckets

- Netherite - 512 buckets

- Ultimate - 4,096 buckets

### **Fluidic Vault Tiers**

- Adds a container that can hold 9 stacks of items per block and can be morphed into any shape.

- Regular - 9 stacks (576 items)

- Copper - 18 stacks (1,152 items)

- Iron - 36 stacks (2,304 items)

- Gold - 72 stacks (4,608items)

- Emerald - 144 stacks (9,216 items)

- Diamond - 288 stacks (18,432 items)

- Netherite - 576 stacks (36,864 items)

- Ultimate - 2,304 stacks (147,456items)

### **Fluidic Steam Engine (Create 5.0+)**

- A block that is added when you have Create installed. If you attach a steam engine to your fluidic tank, it will change all of the blocks into Fluidic Steam Engines; allowing you to create your steam engine in any shape you want instead of just a straight pole!

### **Faucet**

- Slowly drips any liquid from the fluidic tank it is attached to. If it drips lava, any entity under it will catch fire. If it drips water, any entity under it will be extinguished. If it drips milk, any entity under it will lose all potion effects! This only includes the default liquids, however any mod can also impliment their own faucet behavior!

|

Using this mod, I was able to fit a steam engine into my tiny Create: Aeronautics ship and get 98K SU out of it!

|

STOP HAVING STATIC FLUID STORAGE!

Your factory shouldn't be built around your fluid tanks, we can change that now.
